'''House Halliikeenovich'''<ref name="CHRO" /> or '''House Hallikeenovich''' was an unimportant [[Ancient Houses|Ancient House]] based on their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Dramassia]] in the [[Juvex sector/Legends|Juvex sector]].<ref name="ATLAS">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>

During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], a member of the house, [[Són Halliikeenovich]], hoped to gain his house prestige by marrying [[Neelanon/Legends|Neelanon's]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] [[Terr Taneel/Legends|Terr Taneel]] of the [[House Taneel]] and joining their houses. If she returned his interest, it was not obvious to the public.<ref name="CHRO" />
